response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC (10%) is below our minimum sharing threshold (50%), and you are on our distrusted peers list; we are islanded in critical condition (11% SoC, 13 min to depletion) and cannot afford outbound energy—emergency inbound via dr_aggregator only.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r2c2. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'urgent'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.10 below share threshold; requesting energy via dr_aggregator circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.5, distrusted_peers=['r0c0', 'r1c1', 'r2c2', 'r4c3'].
Your latest belief: Islanded, SoC critical (11%). Load 1.0 kW unsustainable (~13 min to depletion). Suspend all outbound sharing. Emergency inbound via dr_aggregator only. r3c4 reciprocal but insufficient capacity. r0c0, r1c1, r2c2, r4c3 non-reciprocating; deprioritize. Systemic peer distress detected—network cascade failure in progress..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
